question: The first licensed Mickey Mouse wristwatch, released in 1933, was manufactured by which watch company?
Roy E. Disney's 2003 resignation and 'Save Disney' campaign publicly called for the ouster of which Disney CEO?

Toy Story: The Musical had its 2008 premiere in the Walt Disney Theatre aboard which Disney Cruise Line ship?
In the Disney Dream and Disney Fantasy stage show Disney's Believe, what is the name of the young girl trying to convince her father that magic is real?
The elaborate Beauty and the Beast stage show that debuted in the Walt Disney Theatre in 2017 plays exclusively on which Disney Cruise Line ship?
Disney's Aladdin - A Musical Spectacular plays in the Walt Disney Theatre on the Disney Wish and which other ship?
Before Disney Cruise Line bought and renamed it, the Disney Adventure was originally being built as the Global Dream for which financially troubled cruise operator?
What is the nickname of the distinctive dark hull color used on Disney Cruise Line ships, named after a cast member whose blue pants inspired the shade?
Which pop star served as godmother of the Disney Fantasy, christening the ship in New York City in 2012?
Which singer, who got her professional start performing aboard the Disney Wonder, returned in 2011 as godmother of the newly christened Disney Dream?

Which singer-songwriter composed the score and recorded 'You've Got a Friend in Me' for Toy Story, going on to score Monsters, Inc. and Cars as well?

Randy Newman won his second Best Original Song Oscar for 'We Belong Together,' from which 2010 Pixar film?
In Coco, what is the title of the fast-paced son jarocho-style song Miguel performs at the plaza talent show, whose title translates to roughly 'A Little Crazy'?
Alongside Coco co-director and story artist Adrian Molina, which composer and songwriter co-wrote 'Un Poco Loco'?
Soul (2020) won the Oscar for Best Original Score for music co-written by Trent Reznor and Atticus Ross alongside which jazz pianist and bandleader?
In Turning Red, what is the title of the fictional boy band 4*Town's song, written by Billie Eilish and Finneas O'Connell, that plays during the film's emotional concert climax?

Which composer, also known for scoring the Pitch Perfect films and Marvel's Ant-Man movies, wrote the orchestral score for both Frozen and Frozen II?

Which composer wrote the music for the Haunted Mansion's theme song 'Grim Grinning Ghosts'?

Composer Alan Menken has won 8 Academy Awards for his Disney scores and songs, making him one of the small group of entertainers to achieve which elite award status spanning Emmy, Grammy, Oscar, and Tony wins?
In Tarzan, what is the name of the gorilla troop leader and Kala's mate, who is initially cold toward the orphaned Tarzan?
In the 1999 Disney film, who does the dying Kerchak name as his successor to lead the gorilla troop?
In Finding Nemo, what species of fish is Gill, the battle-scarred leader of the Tank Gang?
In Finding Nemo, how did Gill get the scars along his side and his torn fin?
answers: A bite from Bruce the shark
